{"result":"Day advanced to 2026-03-22.
5,720 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-21 -> 2026-03-22)

- "Through which country's intermediaries will Donald Trump's 15-point plan be conveyed to Iran by March 25, 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Oman: 0.35, Qatar: 0.22, Switzerland: 0.10, Turkey: 0.08} | Truth: Pakistan

- "From which city will the flight involved in the ground-vehicle collision during landing at a New York airport have departed by March 23, 2026?" → Montreal
- "Which news organization’s journalists will be surrounded by local residents while covering a suspected arson attack in North London, as publicly identified by 31 March 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {BBC: 0.25, Sky News: 0.15, ITV News: 0.08} | Truth: Al Jazeera
  Brier: -0.09 | TW-Score: -6.65
- "Which town in southern Lebanon will be named as the place where a mosque minaret is blown up by March 24, 2026?" → Khiam
- "Which air force will the crashed plane be reported as belonging to by March 24, 2026?" → Colombian air force

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 225 (309 resolved, 21 active)
- accuracy: 14.5% | brier skill score: 0.059 | time weighted score: 1752.51
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions"}
